name: Oil Cake (Gliko Tapsiou Me Ladi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1 1/2 cups of oil and 1 1/2 cups of orange juice.
2. Combine the oil, orange juice, and sugar in a large bowl.
3. In a separate small bowl, dissolve baking soda with brandy.
4. Add the dissolved mixture to the oil mixture; stir in cinnamon and ground cloves.
5. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring constantly until just combined.
6. Mix in walnuts and raisins.
7. Grease a medium-sized baking pan and pour in the batter.
8. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-50 minutes.
10. Cut into oblong pieces to serve.
